<!-- VS Code Workspace Instructions for MCP GitHub Integration -->

# MCP GitHub Server Integration Workspace

This workspace provides a complete setup for integrating GitHub MCP (Model Context Protocol) server with VS Code and creating AI agents that interact with GitHub.

## Project Type
MCP Server Integration + AI Agent Framework

## Primary Use
- Enable AI agents to interact with GitHub (read/write issues, manage PRs, search repos, automate workflows)
- Build autonomous GitHub agents
- Integrate GitHub data into AI decision-making

## Setup Checklist

- [x] Create project structure
- [ ] Install GitHub MCP server
- [ ] Configure authentication (GitHub token)
- [ ] Set up VS Code MCP integration
- [ ] Test MCP connection
- [ ] Build example AI agent
- [ ] Complete documentation
